About Me
Background

I'm passionate about making education more effective through technology. With hands-on experience in e-learning system development, teacher training, and academic research, I bring both a pedagogical and technical perspective to every project. Currently expanding expertise into data analytics and cloud computing.

Work & Research
Jul 2022 – Dec 2023
Student Researcher
Dept. of Electrical and Information Engineering, Universitas Gadjah Mada
Conducted a systematic literature review on chatbot applications in education. Designed and implemented a chatbot model using Microsoft Bot Framework and Azure Language Services. Presented findings at IEEE World AIIoT Congress 2023 — held virtually.
Jul – Oct 2017
Edutech Intern
Dept. of Multimedia, SMKN 4 Semarang
Assisted digital simulation courses for 10th and 11th graders. Organized Android-based learning media workshops for 60+ teachers. Supported initiation of the school's e-learning system and extracurricular information platform.

Research
Publication
IEEE Xplore ↗
Use of Chatbots in E-Learning Context: A Systematic Review

Presented at IEEE World AI IoT Congress (AIIoT) 2023, Seattle, WA. A comprehensive systematic review analyzing chatbot applications in education — benefits, challenges, and future directions for AI-driven learning tools.
